case_title: FRANK THERRE VS. TIMOGEN SYSTEMS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THERRE, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT TIMOGEN SYSTEMS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA PROSOURCE DEVELOPMENT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THERRE, FRANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIMOGEN SYSTEMS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA PROSOURCE DEVELOPMENT $29,538.11 PRINCIPAL, $238.35 INTEREST, $325.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,101.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
